steps.action: Giddha (Punjabi: ਗਿੱਧਾ) is a popular folk dance with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Giddha (Punjabi: ਗਿੱਧਾ) is a popular folk dance with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: The dance is often considered derived from the a
steps.text: The dance is often considered derived from the ancient dance known as the ring dance and is just as energetic as bhangra; at the same time it manages to creatively display feminine grace, elegance and flexibility.

steps.action: It is a highly colourful dance form which has sp
steps.text: It is a highly colourful dance form which has spread to all regions of India.

steps.action: Women perform this dance mainly at festive or so
steps.text: Women perform this dance mainly at festive or social occasions.

steps.action: The dance is accompanied by rhythmic clapping, w
steps.text: The dance is accompanied by rhythmic clapping, with a typical traditional folk song performed by elder women in the background.

steps.action: Giddha varies from other forms of traditional Pu
steps.text: Giddha varies from other forms of traditional Punjabi dance in that it does not require the two-headed barrel dhol drum to be performed.

steps.action: Instead, women stand in a circle formation and c
steps.text: Instead, women stand in a circle formation and clap rhythms.

steps.action: A lead woman will recite a boli (lyrics) with a
steps.text: A lead woman will recite a boli (lyrics) with a refrain that the entire circle then repeats.

steps.action: Giddha displays a traditional mode of performing
steps.text: Giddha displays a traditional mode of performing Punjabi femininity, as seen through dress, choreography, .

steps.action: While the form of giddha was not seriously affec
steps.text: While the form of giddha was not seriously affected by Partition, Gibb Schreffler writes that it has been classified as the women's dance counterpart to the male form bhangra, despite that not entirely being the case.

steps.action: As Punjabi dance forms became codified in the 19
steps.text: As Punjabi dance forms became codified in the 1960s-onward, bhangra and giddha competitions have become popular throughout Punjab and the Punjabi diaspora.

steps.action: Punjabi dance forms have also spread through col
steps.text: Punjabi dance forms have also spread through collegiate-level dance troupes in Punjab since the 1960s and in South Asian student groups in the US, UK, and Canada since the 1990s.

steps.action: The attire is completed by dressing the hair in
steps.text: The attire is completed by dressing the hair in two braids and folk ornaments and wearing a tikka on the forehead.

steps.action: The whole form of a giddha song is worked throug
steps.text: The whole form of a giddha song is worked through in this call and response form.

steps.action: Giddha details stories of women's lives, includi
steps.text: Giddha details stories of women's lives, including sexuality.
